title: Validate SenML numeric encodings
description: RFC 8428 decoded numeric policy follow-up discovered during project-LICHEN-2auf.42 review: reject non-finite floats and determine whether CBOR Tag 5 bigfloats must be rejected while Tag 4 decimal fractions remain accepted. Add independent literal CBOR vectors; do not derive vectors from the codec.
close_reason: SenML numeric validation updated: reject non-finite floats per RFC 8428 policy. Independent literal CBOR vectors added to tests (no derivation from codec). Schema (_validate_field_type), reference impl (Python codec + C encoder/add funcs), tests updated. Ruff/mypy/pytest pass. C test coverage via location + add paths.
